message:
feat(tests): add 9 lane charter gate suites + 2 parser campaign fixtures

Concurrent agent added integration test suites for all new FRX lane charter
gates and parser campaign verification:

Lane charter gate tests (7):
- frx_verification_lane_charter.rs (bd-mjh3.10.4)
- frx_optimization_lane_charter.rs (bd-mjh3.10.5)
- frx_toolchain_lane_charter.rs (bd-mjh3.10.6)
- frx_governance_evidence_lane_charter.rs (bd-mjh3.10.7)
- frx_adoption_release_lane_charter.rs (bd-mjh3.10.8)
- frx_track_b_compiler_frir_spine.rs (compiler FRIR spine)
- frx_track_e_verification_fuzz_formal_coverage_sprint.rs (verification sprint)

Parser campaign tests (2):
- parser_one_lever_optimization_campaign.rs (one-lever optimization)
- parser_regression_bisector_scoreboard.rs (regression attribution)

Fixtures (2):
- fixtures/parser_one_lever_optimization_campaign_v1.json
- fixtures/parser_regression_bisector_scoreboard_v1.json

Also enhanced frx_program_constitution.rs with 5 new cross-document
reference assertions ensuring all lane charters reference the program
constitution document.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

+}
